pluginDescription: Configure how accepted automatic-call proposals are executed across all autocall plugins.
autocallControlsOverviewDesc: These settings apply to every automatic-call proposal plugin instead of belonging to a single watcher. Use them to centrally control whether accepted autocalls should first move to a quieter transmit audio frequency.
autoSelectIdleFrequencyDesc: When any automatic-call proposal is accepted, first look for a quieter transmit audio frequency in the current slot, then start the automatic call.
